title: Error Classes, Discriminated Results, Causes, Retry, and Session Recovery · Compiler Case: Pokedex Ts Error Cause
summary: Catch blocks treat unknown as Error without narrowing, HTTP and validation failures share prose, retry wraps non-idempotent state transitions, causes are lost, and any rejection closes the session. Predict the user decision, runtime value, strict type claim, promise state, API boundary, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex ts error cause increment in causal typed recovery decision model. Learners progress through pred…
objectives: Retain safe causal chains and operation identity while separating internal diagnostics from user-facing recovery text.
Represent input, not-found, HTTP, network, timeout, abort, validation, invariant, storage, and internal failures as exhaustive variants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Pokedex Ts Error Cause
steps.instruction:
